---
pagetitle: "Software"
description: "Open-source R packages and tools by Thinh Ong for infectious disease modelling, biostatistics, and bioinformatics."
page-layout: full
toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(googlesheets4)
source("../code/software.R")

gs4_auth("ongphucthinh@gmail.com")
cv_sheet <- read_sheet(ss = "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ecqMkclPn-lhzgGHw2UTueiKkjTxuoAvJjpFKs3Jtm4/edit?usp=sharing", sheet = "software")

cv_sheet$logo <- paste0("../img/software/", cv_sheet$logo)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
gen_software_table(cv_sheet)
```

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  var reduce = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;

  // Count-up animation for the header stat numbers
  document.querySelectorAll('.sw-stat-num').forEach(function (el) {
    var to = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-to'), 10) || 0;
    if (reduce) { el.textContent = to; return; }
    var n = 0, step = Math.max(1, Math.round(to / 18));
    el.textContent = '0';
    var t = setInterval(function () { n += step; if (n >= to) { n = to; clearInterval(t); } el.textContent = n; }, 50);
  });

  // Category filter: show / hide whole category sections
  var btns = document.querySelectorAll('.sw-filters .sw-filter-btn');
  var sections = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.sw-cat'));
  btns.forEach(function (b) {
    b.addEventListener('click', function () {
      btns.forEach(function (x) { x.classList.remove('active'); });
      b.classList.add('active');
      var f = b.getAttribute('data-filter');
      sections.forEach(function (s) {
        var match = (f === 'all' || s.getAttribute('data-cat') === f);
        if (match) {
          s.style.display = '';
          if (!reduce) { s.style.animation = 'none'; void s.offsetWidth; s.style.animation = 'sw-popIn .45s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) both'; }
        } else {
          s.style.display = 'none';
        }
      });
    });
  });
})();
</script>
```
